rows.label: tlk45320391_02_msg0001
rows.name:
We received word that Superbia
has initiated open conflict.

rows.label: tlk45320391_02_msg0002
rows.name:
I'd like to send a Divine Beast weapon
to back them up, but with few people
assigned, we've made little progress.

rows.label: tlk45320391_02_msg0003
rows.name:
I just hope we'll still have
a homeland to go back to at
the end of all this...
